basis.target_market: Retail prop-firm traders, forex (MT4/MT5), crypto perp traders (Binance/Bybit/OKX/Bitget), and futures traders. Global, English-speaking. Positions itself against TradeZella/TraderSync as a one-time-purchase alternative.
basis.pricing_model: One-time purchase (lifetime access). Pro tier $179, Expert tier $349 (Expert adds prop-firm simulator + Notion integration with 23 embeddable widgets). Free tier allows ~30 trades/month. Marketing pushes 'own it, don't rent it' against $30-50/mo subscriptions.

ai_features.feature_name: AI Coach (paired with Leak Map and Backtester)
ai_features.ai_scope: Per-trade explanations, per-period leak diagnosis (Leak Map ranks recurring patterns by capital impact), per-setup backtest validation, and per-account reviews. Output is aggregated into 'Next session command' (one-line rule).
ai_features.ai_proactive_vs_reactive: Hybrid. Pull mode via AI chat questions about specific trades, plus push mode through automated Leak Map ranking and 'next-session commands' generated after each review window.
ai_features.ai_minimum_trade_threshold: No explicit minimum stated; testimonials cite useful output from 60-312 trade imports [uncertain]
ai_features.ai_underlying_tech: Not specified publicly; described only as 'behavioral AI'. [uncertain]
ai_features.output_format: Structured cards (Leak Map ranks patterns with impact, sample, rule, edge) + plain-English AI Coach chat + journal entries + weekly/monthly/yearly summary reports + 'Next session command' single-line rule. Exportable CSV/JSON.
ai_features.notable_prompts: Inferred from marketing examples: 'Why is this leak happening?', 'Which setup has the cleanest edge?', 'What rule should I execute next session?', 'Did this setup pass the evidence threshold to be promoted to core playbook?'. AI Coach asks clarifying questions like 'why did you enter your third GBP/JPY trade?'. [uncertain - exact prompt text not public]

playbook_depth.playbook_concept_maturity: rule-adherence-scored / approaching AI-coached. Playbook separates 'core' (proven) from 'testing' setups, with promotion gated on sample size, edge drift, and execution quality. Strategies don't become core until evidence supports them.
playbook_depth.setup_level_ai: Strong setup-level focus. Backtester validates individual setups against actual trade behavior. 'Equity by setup' isolates winning strategies (e.g., 'BOS PF 7.49 at 71.4% WR in NY' vs leaky setups). Suggests promotion/demotion of setups based on drift detection. Per-setup session breakdown is built-in (London BOS vs Asia drag).
playbook_depth.rule_adherence_scoring: Yes — Leak Map quantifies repeated rule-violations as capital attribution ('No Setup' leaked -EUR55.30, untagged cluster -EUR25.56). Rules are extracted from trade history and surfaced as 'next-session commands' (e.g., 'Stop after 2 losses, skip Friday PM').
playbook_depth.pre_trade_validation: Not a first-class feature. Backtester validates setups post-import (before promoting to core playbook), but no real-time pre-entry pressure-test of a planned trade. Focus is post-mortem review feeding forward rules.
playbook_depth.playbook_template_library: Not prominent in marketing; users build their own playbooks. [uncertain]

privacy_stack.privacy_model: Vendor-hosted (web app at app.traderssecondbrain.com). No own-API-key option mentioned. Marketing emphasizes data ownership via exportable CSV/JSON.
privacy_stack.data_residency: Cloud-hosted (vendor servers). Exact region not stated. Local Notion sync option for Expert tier.
privacy_stack.cost_per_month_user: Amortized: Pro $179 one-time = ~$5/mo over 3 years, Expert $349 = ~$10/mo over 3 years. No additional AI surcharge — behavioral AI is included in purchase price.

crypto_fit.crypto_perp_exchange_support: Native exchange APIs: Binance, Bybit, OKX, Bitget, 'and more'. No explicit mention of Hyperliquid, Blofin, or MEXC. Crypto-perp positioning is solid for major CEXs.
crypto_fit.multi_asset: Forex (MT4/MT5), crypto (perp/spot via exchange APIs), futures (via CSV/broker exports), stocks/equities via IBKR Flex. Multi-asset by design.
crypto_fit.partial_close_awareness: Supports 'DCA and partial exits' with per-account evidence tracking. Treated as first-class but depth of multi-TP analytics not fully detailed in public marketing. [uncertain on whether per-TP breakdown like WR-per-TP-level is computed]
crypto_fit.gap_session_breakdown_per_setup: Yes — Leak Map and Playbook explicitly show 'BOS · 71.4% WR' broken down by session (London vs NY vs Asia). Capital attribution per session per setup is a core feature.

coaching_depth.coaching_depth_level: deep_pattern_analysis. Beyond surface metrics: causal explanation ('London stays green at +EUR412.91 while Asia leaks -EUR25.56') with actionable rule ('Tag every trade before promoting any setup'). Each leak comes with evidence + impact + rule to execute.
coaching_depth.psychology_metrics: Behavior tags (untagged trades, FOMO patterns inferred from re-entry), session-of-day patterns, leak-density per session. Less explicit emotion/tilt scoring than Plancana, more behavioral pattern detection.
coaching_depth.voice_journaling: Yes — 'Manual + Voice Log' is listed as an import option for trades, notes, and review context.
coaching_depth.mentor_mode: No formal coach-review feature mentioned. Individually focused with email support.

community.community_driven_ai: Not a community/shared-AI model. Each user's data feeds only their own AI Coach. Notion templates (Expert tier) suggest some template-sharing potential but no collective intelligence.
community.changelog_ai_velocity: Active in 2026 — comparison tables dated March 2026, new content shipped through May 2026. AI Coach + Leak Map appear to be the recent major releases. [uncertain on exact release dates]
